Class FileCollector

java.lang.Object
recoder.util.FileCollector
public class FileCollector extends Object
Convenience class to collect all files of a directory tree, recursively. The collection obeys the following rules:
  1. If a name corresponds to a file, it is reported.
  2. If a name corresponds to a non-existing file, nothing is reported.
  3. If a name corresponds to a directory, the directory itself is not reported, but all files in it, following rules 1-3. This will lead to a recursive collection of all files in all subdirectories.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    FileCollector(File root)
    Create a file collector starting with the given file.
    FileCollector(String root)
    Create a file collector starting with the given filename.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    File
    getFile()
    Fetch the current file, or null if no one is available.
    boolean
    next()
    Proceed to the next file and return if this has been possible.
    boolean
    next(FilenameFilter filter)
    Proceed to the next file that is accepted by the given filter and return if this has been possible.
    boolean
    next(String suffix)
    Proceed to the next file with the given suffix and return if this has been possible.

  • Constructor Details

    • FileCollector

      public FileCollector(String root)
      Create a file collector starting with the given filename.

    • FileCollector

      public FileCollector(File root)
      Create a file collector starting with the given file.

  • Method Details

    • next

      public boolean next()
      Proceed to the next file and return if this has been possible.
      Returns:
      true iff there is a next file available for getFile().

    • next

      public boolean next(String suffix)
      Proceed to the next file with the given suffix and return if this has been possible. Remember to include the dot in the suffix (".java", not "java").
      Returns:
      true iff there is a next file with the given extension available for getFile().

    • next

      public boolean next(FilenameFilter filter)
      Proceed to the next file that is accepted by the given filter and return if this has been possible.
      Returns:
      true iff there is a next file available for getFile() that is accepted by the filter.

    • getFile

      public File getFile()
      Fetch the current file, or null if no one is available.
      Returns:
      the current file, or null if next()has not been called before or returned false.
